calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-13-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-13-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue M. Kaplan, S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Neveo Mosser.
Plaintiff's Witness: Elias Rodriquez, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Ruben Cervantes and Defaulted Defendant: Maria Guadalupe Cervantes.
Exh. 1 - Residential Rental Agreement----------ID/EVID.
Exh. 2 - Threeday Notice-----------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Ruben Cervantes and Maria Guadalupe Cervantes as follows:
Restitution and possession of the property located at 545 O'Farrell St., #312, San Francisco.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Back-Rents and Damages $1,459.39
Attorney's Fees $400.00
Waived Costs, for a Total of $1,859.39
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MICHAEL ROSSOFF FOR PLAINTIFF NEVEO MOSSER.
DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT.

THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER TAKEN OFF CALENDAR.
TRIAL DATE REMAINS ON CALENDAR.
